title: Hydra model pricing table
description: Model -> per-million-token USD rates used by scripts/trace-cost.sh to convert trace token usage into cost_usd, and by cost-rollup.sh / cost-per-pr.sh for the cost-per-merged-PR metric. Phase 1 (flat subscription) treats this as a modeled estimate; Phase 2 (Anthropic API) as real spend. Spec: docs/specs/2026-05-21-per-ticket-cost-and-cost-per-pr.md (ticket #195).

currency.description: ISO currency code for the rates (e.g. USD).

unit.description: Rate unit. Only per_million_tokens is supported in v1.

models.description: Map of model id -> {input, output} rate. Must include a 'default' entry so an unlisted model never silently zeroes a cost.
